module.name: ast/calls
module.description: Higher-level AST helpers for evaluating call and callee shapes.

scenarios.name: should return a single segment for an identifier callee
scenarios.given: a callee node that is an Identifier
scenarios.then: returns an array containing the identifier name

scenarios.name: should return the full path for chained member callees
scenarios.given: a callee node composed of nested MemberExpression segments with static property names
scenarios.then: returns the ordered callee name path

scenarios.name: should unwrap nested call-expression callees
scenarios.given: a CallExpression whose callee is itself a statically resolvable callee chain
scenarios.then: returns the ordered callee name path of the nested callee

scenarios.name: should return null when the callee path cannot be resolved statically
scenarios.given: a callee path that includes a computed member with a non-string-resolvable property

scenarios.name: should return null for unsupported callee node shapes
scenarios.given: a callee node that is neither an Identifier, MemberExpression, nor CallExpression

scenarios.name: should return the requested call argument when it exists
scenarios.given: a CallExpression with an argument at the requested index

scenarios.name: should return null when the requested call argument is absent
scenarios.given: a CallExpression without an argument at the requested index

scenarios.name: should return the string-literal call argument when the argument is a string literal
scenarios.given: a CallExpression whose argument at the requested index is a string literal

scenarios.name: should return null when the requested call argument is not a string literal
scenarios.given: a CallExpression whose argument at the requested index is missing or not a string literal

scenarios.name: should match a call expression when its resolved callee path exactly matches
scenarios.given: a CallExpression whose callee resolves to the expected ordered path, including string-computed member segments

scenarios.name: should not match a call expression when its resolved callee path differs
scenarios.given: a CallExpression whose callee resolves to a different path than the expected ordered path

scenarios.name: should return the member method name when it matches the allowed set
scenarios.given: a CallExpression that targets a member method whose static name is included in the allowed set

scenarios.name: should return null when the member method name does not match the allowed set
scenarios.given: a CallExpression whose static member method name is absent or not included in the allowed set
